title: Can you push a slack message into a new Monday Task
excerpt:
Hello! 
My company uses Slack for EVERYTHING. So I get messages saying “can you please do this task” I want to be able to right click and send that message into Monday.com as a Tasks. Is this possible?

posts.author: michaelbarron27 (Michael A)
posts.cookedHtml:

My company uses Slack for EVERYTHING. So I get messages saying “can you please do this task” I want to be able to right click and send that message into Monday.com as a Tasks. Is this possible?
